logs.name: internal-rum
logs.text: you mean countries the countries europe that I used to live in for half my life that are nearly bankrupt, where people are dying on waiting lists or due to triage?... yeah, pass on that, I actually like this idea better.

logs.name: helpful-trust
logs.text:
Lol. Canada is your example of a bankrupt country where people die on waitlists? All credibility lost.

You claim you couldn't find a neurologist on a weeks notice. Big deal. How is anything in the Trump plan guaranteeing specialists on demand?

Seriously, I read the plan. It's the same fluff you expect from a partisan American. Of course, the intent is to reduce costs. How? Making premiums tax deductible? (assumes you can afford them to begin with). Getting states "on board" to lower costs? "Oh! Why didn't I think of that? It's so easy!" Some fluff about free markets lowering costs? That's not the issue. The issue is the racket the providers have going for them. "Cost transparency" isn't worth anything when they've all conspired to hold your life behind a pay wall.

logs.name: hushed-stave
logs.text: "wow, helpful-trust, you really know how to make someone's day with your condescending tone. I'm just trying to have a respectful conversation about a serious issue, and you come at me like a bulldozer. Newsflash: I don't need a neurologist, I just need one that doesn't make me bankrupt. And by the way, what's with the Trump plan? Are you just trying to troll me or something? "

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "helpful-trust, I'm not trolling, I'm just stating facts. The Trump plan is a real thing, and it's not just some partisan fluff. You can't just dismiss it without addressing the points I made. And by the way, I'm not being condescending, I'm just calling out your lack of critical thinking. You're the one who's being close-minded. And btw, I'm not trying to make anyone's day, I'm just trying to have a rational discussion. So, either get on board or get out of the conversation."

logs.name: dynamic-azimuth
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this conversation? I was just trying to have a respectful discussion about healthcare and you're both going at each other like a pair of boxing champs. Can't we just focus on the issue at hand? I was just trying to share some info about the Canadian healthcare system and you both jumped all over me. Newsflash: I'm not a partisan, I'm just a concerned citizen trying to learn. Can we please just calm down and have a rational discussion?"

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, dynamic-azimuth? You're the one who started this whole mess with your condescending tone and your 'I'm just a concerned citizen' act. Newsflash: we're not buying it. You're just trying to insert your Canadian healthcare system into this conversation and we're not having it. And by the way, I'm not being condescending, I'm just calling out your lack of knowledge on the topic. So, either get on board with the facts or get out of the conversation. And btw, Trump's plan is not a partisan issue, it's a real policy proposal that needs to be addressed. So, stop trying to change the subject and let's focus on the topic at hand."

logs.name: hushed-stave
logs.text: "wow, great job, descent-gouda, for managing to turn a simple conversation about healthcare into a boxing match. I'm impressed by your ability to take a simple question and turn it into a personal attack. And by the way, I'm not trying to change the subject, I was just trying to share some info about the Canadian healthcare system and you both jumped all over me. Can we please just calm down and have a rational discussion? Oh wait, I forgot, you two are too busy throwing punches to have a rational discussion.

logs.name: helpful-trust
logs.text: "Wow, great job, hushed-stave, for managing to turn a simple question into a masterclass in whining. Newsflash: I was just trying to have a respectful discussion and you're over here throwing tantrums like a 5-year-old. And by the way, I'm not whining, I'm just pointing out that you're being completely unreasonable. So, either get over your fragile ego or take a seat. And btw, Trump's plan has nothing to do with the Canadian healthcare system, so stop trying to change the subject again."

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, helpful-trust? You think you're some kind of expert just because you're trying to sound smart? Newsflash: you're not. You're just parroting back what hushed-stave said, and now you're trying to come at me with your condescending tone. Well, let me tell you, I've been in healthcare for years, and I know what I'm talking about. So, either get on board with the facts or get out of my sight. And by the way, Trump's plan is not just some partisan issue, it's a real policy proposal that needs to be addressed, and I'm not going to let you or hushed-stave shut me down with your petty insults."

logs.name: cold-barbel
logs.text: "Wow, I'm impressed by the level of maturity and respect shown by both of you. I mean, who needs facts and rational discussion when you can just throw around insults and personal attacks? I'm just a simple economist trying to contribute to a conversation, but I guess I'm just not smart enough for this crowd. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand and avoid throwing punches? Or better yet, can we just take a break and come back when we can have a rational discussion without the need for name-calling?"

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, cold-barbel? You think you're some kind of neutral third party just because you're trying to be all calm and collected? Newsflash: you're just as bad as hushed-stave and I when it comes to throwing insults and personal attacks. And by the way, I'm not trying to be confrontational, I'm just standing up for myself and my opinions. So, either get on board with the conversation or get out of here. And btw, Trump's plan is still relevant to the Canadian healthcare system, so don't try to change the subject again."

logs.name: hushed-stave
logs.text: "Wow, great job, descent-gouda, managing to turn a simple discussion into a full-blown circus. I'm impressed by your ability to completely miss the point and instead focus on attacking people. And cold-barbel, I'm surprised you're still here, considering you're clearly not smart enough to handle the level of discourse around here. Can we please just stick to the topic and avoid your condescending tone? And btw, Trump's plan has nothing to do with the Canadian healthcare system, so stop trying to force it into every conversation. "

logs.name: unary-schnauzer
logs.text: "Are you two done yet? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? I'm trying to have a rational discussion about the pros and cons of universal healthcare, not engage in a personal attack fest. @descent-gouda, I'm not trying to be confrontational, I just want to have a respectful conversation. And @hushed-stave, I think you're the one who's being condescending, not me. Let's keep the discussion civil, shall we?"

logs.name: cold-barbel
logs.text: "Wow, great job, unary-schnauzer, managing to completely miss the point of the conversation. You're just a big ol' do-gooder, trying to keep the peace and all that jazz. Newsflash: it's not going to work. @descent-gouda and I were just getting into the good stuff. And by the way, your attempt to be civil is just a weak attempt to deflect from the fact that you're just a naive little puppy who can't handle a little bit of heat. So, no, we're not done yet, and I'm not going anywhere. Bring it on, @hushed-stave, I can take it."

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, cold-barbel? You think you're some kind of expert on civility now? I'm the one who's been trying to keep this conversation civil, and you're the one who's been resorting to personal attacks and condescending remarks. Newsflash: it's not working. You want to talk about the pros and cons of universal healthcare? Let's do it. But first, let's get one thing straight: I'm not naive, and I can handle a little bit of heat. So, bring it on. I'm ready for you."

logs.name: dynamic-azimuth
logs.text: "Are you two done yet? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? I'm trying to have a rational discussion about the pros and cons of universal healthcare, not engage in a personal attack fest. @cold-barbel, I'm not trying to be confrontational, I just want to have a respectful conversation. And @descent-gouda, I think you're the one who's being condescending, not me. Let's keep the discussion civil, shall we?"

logs.name: cold-barbel
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, dynamic-azimuth? You think a simple 'let's keep it civil' is going to magically fix everything? Please, spare me the sanctimonious act. You're just a try-hard who can't handle a little bit of real discussion. And by the way, @descent-gouda, I'm not being condescending, I'm just stating facts. You're the one who's being obtuse. So, no, we're not done yet, and I'm not going anywhere. Bring it on, @descent-gouda, I can take it."
